Off Calendar Oct-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (318 30th Avenue, San Francisco, California 94121)
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Eli Alavi for Daniel Cunningham who is present in court.

The sale was confirmed at $1,242,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 1, 2015. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
